tagline: Slow-braised barbacoa over cilantro-lime rice, drenched in our smoky red chili mole-style salsa with a cool queso finish.

confidence_reason: Mole is the top-ranked signal at 0.88 with strong dual trend + local Yelp pull, and WeHo's Gracias Madre / Mexican-fusion scene already primes guests for mole-style heat.

tagline: Pineapple-achiote chicken al pastor and smoky fajita veggies on crispy corn tacos with a bright corn-poblano salsa.

tagline: Glazed salmon over super greens with sesame-bright strawberry dressing, avocado, and crunchy sumac chips.

tagline: Warm portobello and roasted sweet potato over kale with shaved parmesan, garlic breadcrumbs, and a silky pesto vinaigrette.
